requirements_summary.problem: prediction-prime 'runs but never fills': a critical seam (feed→bookCache) shipped fake-socket-tested; no REAL-DATA test ever ran live while every guardrail passed green. Two mechanisms in THIS skill: (1) the MOCK-justification bar degraded from 'impossible to reproduce live' to 'hard to make deterministic'; (2) guardrails are document linters and nothing forces a critical-seam REAL-DATA test to execute before the gauntlet.
user_types: Spec authors (Claude + opponent models) running adversarial-spec sessions
Operator/conductor (Jason) driving sessions and reading meta-analysis
fizzy_pipeline_mcp (downstream consumer of the shared TMR contract; enforces at sweep)
Any project specced through adversarial-spec (inherits the new gates, version-fenced)
features: A: authoring — happy-path spine (TC-0) per user story w/ named steps; failure tests anchored via spine_step_ref; TMR fields in tests-pseudo.md; maturity-aware
B: strict MOCK falsification — name the live/induced technique (toxiproxy/tc-netem/external-kill/natural-wait) or promote to REAL-DATA
C: TRACE inversion — missing happy-path spine = ORPHANED traceability break; absorb 'is the labeled spine the real primary path'
D: TCOV — promoter (nl→acceptance), ingest ALL test files, strict data_strategy_mismatch, new missing_liveness_test category
F': deterministic happy-path-spine coverage gate in debate.py enforce_pipeline_card_gate (maturity-aware, logged-override) — the teeth
G: Phase-8 pseudo→real promotion pass (write+run critical-seam/spine tests, require green)
J: append-only decision provenance journal over subject_type∈{test,node} (test-journey + altitude-triage)
K: parallel-subagent structured guardrails feeding J
Keystone: shared TMR schema contract with fizzy (schema-first; field-for-field)
Version-fence: new gates apply to new specs only; in-flight sessions untouched
integrations: fizzy_pipeline_mcp — cross-repo TMR contract; fizzy P0 adds VALID_DATA_STRATEGIES / VALID_LIVENESS_TECHNIQUES / maturity + builds gates (no M-4b exists)
adversaries.py — hub (9+ importers); TRACE/TCOV edits ripple
debate.py enforce_pipeline_card_gate — F' sibling to the existing tests-pseudo staleness gate
validation-leg / system-validation — the live-run verification mechanism for prompt/doc deliverables (already built in this repo)

verification_tiers.code: executable Python (F', provenance writer, validators, emission) → REAL-DATA pytest against real artifact fixtures
verification_tiers.prompt_doc: phase-doc/guardrail-prompt behavior → system-validation live skill run + fault-induced fixture specs (broken specs the gate must catch)
verification_tiers.llm_judgment: guardrail catch quality → golden-case eval against planted-defect corpus (REAL-DATA+PROPERTY)

tradeoffs: No dogfood now; version the changes (run the session on the current skill version)
Enforcement in CODE (F' deterministic) over LLM judgment where possible
Keep the guardrail set at five (no new adversaries)
risks: Cross-repo schema drift — mitigated schema-first + field-for-field
Prompt/doc tiers inherently softer (LLM variance) — mitigated by code teeth + system-validation + golden evals
Concept-accessor façade/binding ownership gap (target-repo, unassigned in all 3 reports) — out of skill scope, flag
unknowns: How parallel-subagent dispatch replaces the inline/critique flow in 03-debate.md (orchestration spec)
F' deterministic parse: roadmap-manifest US enumeration ↔ tests-pseudo spine tags (format coupling)
Version-fence mechanism (skill marker; fizzy verification_contract_version vs altitude gating)
Golden-eval corpus: where planted-defect fixtures live + how many
Coordination handshake with the fizzy spec (which repo lands the schema constants first)
success_criteria: A spec authored through the updated skill cannot reach the gauntlet without a phase-appropriate-maturity happy-path spine test for every user story (F', code-tested)
Every MOCK names a live/induced technique or is promoted (B/D)
Guardrails emit structured, persisted, test/US-keyed findings (K)
The provenance journal answers test-journey, altitude-triage accuracy, and altitude distribution
Every deliverable passes its verification tier (code→pytest; prompt→system-validation; judgment→golden eval)
Shared TMR contract matches fizzy field-for-field; changes version-fenced

framework_profile.framework: Claude Code skill (prompt phase-docs) + Python 3.14 CLI

subprofiles.data_access_model: file artifacts + Fizzy MCP for pipeline state
subprofiles.mutation_model: CLI actions (debate.py critique|gauntlet) + Fizzy pipeline tool calls + atomic file writes
subprofiles.error_model: process exit codes (exit 2 = gate block) + structured findings (ORCH/conflict) + named validation rejections

framework_profile.enforcement_model: Defense-in-depth: skill-side pre-check [PRIMARY] + debate.py enforce_pipeline_card_gate [fallback] + Fizzy sweep.
framework_profile.notes: prompt/doc agent-followed surface is verified via the verification-tier model (system-validation), not modeled as a code execution surface. fizzy_pipeline_mcp is an external coordinated codebase (outbound_integration).

execution_surfaces.uses: debate.py critique/gauntlet; F' gate; override flags; authoring/doc lints
parallel guardrail subagent dispatch + aggregation; append-only journal writer
TMR schema handshake with fizzy validator; run_evidence to fizzy sweep

goals.text: Impossible to reach the gauntlet without a phase-appropriate happy-path spine test for every user story.
Force every MOCK to name the live/induced technique or be promoted to REAL-DATA.
Give the five guardrails structured, persisted, test/US-keyed output.
Provide a durable decision provenance journal (test-maturity + altitude-triage).
Define a shared TMR schema contract with fizzy, schema-first.
Classify every deliverable by verification tier; apply the this-project liveness interpretation.
Version-fence the new gates so in-flight sessions are unaffected.

non_goals: Concept-accessor facade / bindings / fail-closed lint (target-repo + its CI).
Dogfooding these changes on this session (run on current skill version).
Sessions stats dashboard (deferred, forward-only, separate trigger).
prediction-prime live-fill (Track A) and fault-injection infra (B6).

research_findings.finding: system-validation is its own category, neither automated nor exempt; there is NO golden-eval member
round_actions={critique,gauntlet} applies the gate uniformly; F' is the first check that must branch on args.action (block gauntlet / warn critique)
altitude model is built; data_strategy + liveness attach as two missing axes; no 'M-4b test-lineage gate' exists to extend
~/.claude/skills/adversarial-spec is a symlink to source; no copy-deploy step (edits live immediately)

reconciliation.reason: Phase-7 Step 2.5 reconcile-in-place: spec finalized at v12 (Phase 4 was v3-era). Content patch, no model dispatch.
reconciliation.input_fingerprint_basis: sha256(spec.md bytes + 0x00 + roadmap/manifest.json bytes + 0x00 + canonical_json({phase_mode,context_mode})) — OLD value reproduced over spec-draft-v3.md to prove the algorithm
reconciliation.architecture_fingerprint_basis: composite per 04 §0 Fingerprints; active_invariants = architecture-invariants.json .invariants filtered status==active (no active_invariants snapshot was stored in bootstrap, so the v3-era composite is not byte-reproducible — recomputed FORWARD with this documented basis)

roadmap_manifest_fix_2026-06-17.reason: Phase-7 validation leg: roadmap manifest lacked top-level user_stories (derive-conops requires it; canonical shape per validation-leg-process). Flattened 15 stories to top-level (lossless), milestones keep id-string refs. roadmap_bytes changed -> input/arch fingerprints recomputed again.

dimensions.name: execution_model
dimensions.value: agent-driven file-based state machine + Python CLI gates
dimensions.rationale: the skill is prompt phase-docs that an LLM follows, plus debate.py/adversaries.py/gauntlet executable gates

dimensions.name: error_model
dimensions.value: process exit codes (exit 2 block) + structured ORCH/conflict findings + named validation rejections

dimensions.name: config_precedence
dimensions.value: version fence liveness_contract_version=tmr.v1 gates new behavior
dimensions.rationale: no retroactive failure of in-flight sessions

dimensions.name: io_model
dimensions.value: atomic file writes (session-state, tests-pseudo, append-only journal jsonl) + Fizzy MCP pipeline
dimensions.rationale: multi-agent safe concurrent writes via append-only

dimensions.name: observability
dimensions.value: structured per-guardrail output + append-only provenance journal (test + node)

dimensions.name: testing_architecture
dimensions.value: three verification tiers: code (REAL-DATA pytest) / prompt-doc (system-validation + fault-induced) / llm-judgment (golden-case)
dimensions.rationale: skill is part code, part prompts

decision_journal.choice: F' three-layer defense-in-depth: skill-side pre-check is PRIMARY (covers Fizzy-dispatch path), enforce_pipeline_card_gate is standalone fallback, Fizzy enforces at sweep; branch on action (block gauntlet / warn critique); exactly-one spine per US.
decision_journal.rationale: The originating incident shipped a critical seam never proven live; a single enforcement point is bypassable. Defense-in-depth + action-branching makes coverage non-bypassable without blocking early debate.
alternatives_considered: enforce_pipeline_card_gate only (bypassed when dispatch is via Fizzy tools)
absent-test gauntlet adversary F (too late, probabilistic, architecture already designed)
decision_journal.revisit_trigger: if the dispatch path moves away from Fizzy pipeline tools

decision_journal.choice: Fail-closed everywhere: dead/timeout/invalid-JSON subagent -> synthetic ORCH (block gauntlet/warn critique); criticality_unknown at system altitude -> treated critical; conflicting findings -> conflict state before any journaled transition.
decision_journal.rationale: Partial/ambiguous guardrail results read as green are false confidence - the exact failure class this spec exists to kill.

decision_journal.choice: Single canonical TMR schema contract (Brainquarters/shared-context/test-maturity-record-schema.md), referenced never copied; tests-pseudo.md is a feeder/view; critical_seam read only from the normalized field (no re-derivation).
decision_journal.rationale: Divergence of this contract is the exact failure the work prevents; tests-pseudo drifted v2->v7 unchecked under per-side copies.

decision_journal.choice: Single append-only provenance journal over subject_type in {test,node}, derived from accepted STATE CHANGES (not findings alone); prior records never rewritten; node altitude_fit required at close.
decision_journal.rationale: Enables meta-analysis queries impossible today (per-guardrail catch history, altitude calibration); append-only gives safe concurrent multi-agent writes.
alternatives_considered: inline evolution stored on the TMR
altitude accuracy keyed on stability alone (over-counts silently-wrong altitudes)

decision_journal.choice: liveness_contract_version (tmr.v1) gates every new requirement; pre-fence sessions keep original rules (no retroactive failure); TMR fields optional+warn-first until required behind the fence.
decision_journal.rationale: Tightening rules mid-stream would break in-flight sessions such as validation-leg-process.
alternatives_considered: retroactive application of new gates to all sessions

decision_journal.choice: Phase-8: a declared-but-never-run REAL-DATA/critical-seam/spine pseudo test counts as FAILING; run_evidence required; such a test may not be spike/exempt. No golden-eval verification_mode - LLM-judgment tier uses canonical system-validation + a golden-case corpus oracle.
decision_journal.rationale: A declared-but-never-run test is the liveness hole; verification_mode must stay within fizzy's canonical set (no golden-eval member exists).

decision_journal.choice: Advisory only (lightweight): MW-001 TmrParser, MW-002 SpineCoverageChecker, MW-003 ProvenanceJournalWriter identified but not materialized; middleware-creator is optional post-execution.
decision_journal.rationale: Lightweight mode -> candidates are advisory and do not block execution planning; materialization is a downstream choice.
alternatives_considered: materialize shared middleware now (premature for a process-skill slice)
decision_journal.revisit_trigger: if execution planning (Phase 7) chooses to materialize shared middleware

validation_leg.note: module does not stamp drafted_baseline_hash into ledger header; recorded here + git-commit-bound (anti-hindsight). check-rows: ok/0 issues.
